name: Apple Inc.
description: Consumer electronics, software, and services company known for iPhone, Mac, and a growing services ecosystem.

name: Microsoft Corp.
description: Enterprise software, cloud computing (Azure), and productivity tools giant.

name: Alphabet Inc.
description: Parent of Google, dominating search, digital advertising, and cloud with AI investments.

name: Meta Platforms
description: Social media conglomerate (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp) investing heavily in AI and metaverse.

name: Salesforce Inc.
description: Cloud-based CRM and enterprise software leader in customer relationship management.

name: NVIDIA Corp.
description: GPU and AI chip leader powering data centers, gaming, and autonomous vehicles.

name: Taiwan Semiconductor
description: World largest dedicated independent semiconductor foundry manufacturing chips for global tech giants.

name: Advanced Micro Devices
description: Semiconductor company competing in CPUs, GPUs, and data center processors.

name: Broadcom Inc.
description: Semiconductor and infrastructure software company serving data centers and networking.

name: Qualcomm Inc.
description: Wireless technology and mobile chip leader powering 5G and next-gen connectivity.

name: Johnson & Johnson
description: Diversified healthcare giant in pharmaceuticals, medical devices, and consumer health products.

name: UnitedHealth Group
description: Largest US health insurer and healthcare services company through Optum.

name: Pfizer Inc.
description: Global pharmaceutical company known for vaccines, oncology, and innovative therapies.

name: Merck & Co.
description: Pharmaceutical company with leading oncology (Keytruda) and vaccine franchises.

name: AbbVie Inc.
description: Biopharmaceutical company with immunology, oncology, and neuroscience portfolio.

name: Amgen Inc.
description: One of the world largest independent biotechnology companies focused on serious illnesses.

name: Gilead Sciences
description: Biopharmaceutical company specializing in antivirals, HIV, and oncology treatments.

name: Biogen Inc.
description: Biotechnology company focused on neuroscience, multiple sclerosis, and Alzheimer therapies.

name: Vertex Pharmaceuticals
description: Biotech leader in cystic fibrosis treatments with a growing pipeline in pain and gene editing.

name: Moderna Inc.
description: mRNA platform company leveraging technology for vaccines, oncology, and rare diseases.

name: Exxon Mobil
description: One of the world largest integrated oil and gas companies with upstream, downstream, and chemical operations.

name: Chevron Corp.
description: Integrated energy company engaged in petroleum, chemicals, and increasingly renewable energy.

name: Schlumberger
description: World largest oilfield services company providing technology for reservoir characterization and drilling.

name: Enphase Energy
description: Solar microinverter and energy storage systems manufacturer for residential and commercial markets.

name: First Solar
description: American solar panel manufacturer specializing in thin-film technology for utility-scale projects.

name: JPMorgan Chase
description: Largest US bank by assets, offering investment banking, commercial banking, and asset management.

name: Visa Inc.
description: Global payments technology company operating the world largest electronic payments network.

name: Mastercard Inc.
description: Global technology company in the payments industry connecting consumers, financial institutions, and merchants.

name: Bank of America
description: One of the world largest financial institutions offering consumer banking, wealth management, and investment banking.

name: BlackRock Inc.
description: World largest asset manager with over $10 trillion in AUM, operator of iShares ETFs and Aladdin platform.

name: Amazon.com Inc.
description: E-commerce giant and cloud computing leader (AWS) with expanding advertising and logistics businesses.

name: Tesla Inc.
description: Electric vehicle and clean energy company pioneering autonomous driving and energy storage.

name: Nike Inc.
description: Global athletic footwear, apparel, and equipment leader with strong brand loyalty worldwide.

name: Starbucks Corp.
description: World largest coffeehouse chain operating thousands of stores across 80+ countries.

name: McDonald's Corp.
description: Global fast-food restaurant chain and real estate company with 40,000+ locations worldwide.

name: Walt Disney Co.
description: Global entertainment conglomerate spanning streaming (Disney+), parks, studios, and sports (ESPN).

name: Netflix Inc.
description: Leading global streaming entertainment service with 250M+ subscribers and growing ad-supported tier.

name: Warner Bros. Discovery
description: Media conglomerate combining HBO Max, Discovery+, and a vast film and TV content library.

name: Sony Group
description: Japanese conglomerate with gaming (PlayStation), music, film, and semiconductor businesses.

name: Electronic Arts
description: Major video game publisher known for EA Sports (FIFA/Madden), Battlefield, and Apex Legends franchises.

name: Caterpillar Inc.
description: World largest construction and mining equipment manufacturer with a global dealer network.

name: Boeing Co.
description: Aerospace company manufacturing commercial jets, defense systems, and space vehicles.

name: Honeywell International
description: Diversified industrial conglomerate in aerospace, building tech, performance materials, and safety.

name: GE Aerospace
description: Aerospace company manufacturing jet engines and aviation systems, spun off from legacy GE conglomerate.

name: Lockheed Martin
description: Largest defense contractor specializing in fighter jets (F-35), missiles, and space systems.

name: Prologis Inc.
description: Global leader in logistics real estate, owning and managing industrial warehouses for e-commerce.

name: American Tower
description: Global REIT owning and operating wireless and broadcast communications infrastructure.

name: NextEra Energy
description: Largest utility company and world leader in wind and solar energy generation.

name: Dominion Energy
description: Energy utility serving millions of customers with a growing renewable energy portfolio.

name: Southern Company
description: Major US utility company providing electric and gas service with nuclear and renewable investments.

name: AT&T Inc.
description: Telecom giant providing wireless, broadband, and fiber services to millions of US consumers.

name: Verizon Comm.
description: Major wireless carrier and broadband provider with nationwide 5G network coverage.

name: T-Mobile US
description: Fastest-growing US wireless carrier known for aggressive pricing and 5G leadership.

name: Comcast Corp.
description: Media and telecom conglomerate operating Xfinity broadband, NBCUniversal, and Sky.

name: CME Group
description: World largest financial derivatives exchange operator (Chicago Mercantile Exchange).

name: Linde PLC
description: World largest industrial gas company serving healthcare, manufacturing, and electronics.

name: Newmont Corp.
description: World largest gold mining company with operations across multiple continents.

name: Freeport-McMoRan
description: One of the world largest copper miners with significant gold and molybdenum operations.

name: Sherwin-Williams
description: Global leader in paint and coatings manufacturing for professional and retail markets.

name: Air Products & Chemicals
description: Industrial gases company supplying hydrogen, helium, and atmospheric gases globally.
